examples: I am now starting to assign ranges for the forty trillionth bit calculation.
The research could explain what happened in the first trillionth of a second after the Big Bang.
The X-ray pulses have a shutter speed of less than 100 femtoseconds (100 femtoseconds = 1/10 of a trillionth of a second).
So even if our exposure time is indeed nearly a trillionth of a second, to get sufficient light we must take an average.
So what about in a trillionth of a second?
